Meta.title: Croatia Sport Live – Croatian footballers & matches live
Meta.description: Live scores, tracker, news and TV tips for Croatian footballers in Premier League, Bundesliga, Serie A, HNL and Nations League.
Meta.keywords: Croatia, football, live, Modric, Gvardiol, HNL, Vatreni, scores, news

Hero.title: Croatian football stars.
Hero.subtitle: Scores, news and upcoming matches of Modrić, Gvardiol & Co. – across all top leagues.

Favorites.title: My Croatians
Favorites.subtitle: {count} favorite players
Favorites.emptyHint: Tap the star on a player – then their next matches show up here.
Favorites.emptyFilterHint: Star some players or turn the filter off.
Favorites.emptyMatchesHint: Favorite players or turn off the favorites filter.

Push.title: Match reminders
Push.body: Get a browser alert ~15 min before your favorites kick off.

Pwa.title: Add to home screen
Pwa.body: Install KSL for faster access – like an app.
Pwa.iosBody: Tap Share → “Add to Home Screen” for the app version.

Vatreni.title: National team
Vatreni.subtitle: All upcoming internationals · squad after nomination
Vatreni.emptyHint: API empty or offline. Please refresh.
Vatreni.emptyUpcomingHint: You can expand past matches below.

News.title: News
News.subtitle: Vatreni & club updates · live fixtures · auto feed

Dashboard.title: Matches
Dashboard.subtitle: Clubs with Croatian players
Dashboard.empty: No matches found for these filters.
Dashboard.emptyHint: Reset filters or choose another date range.
Dashboard.noFinished: No finished matches for this filter.

Players.title: Player tracker
Players.subtitle: Click a player to see their matches
Players.emptyHint: Clear search or try another name.

PlayerDetail.cannotChange: You cannot change status yourself – only send a suggestion.
PlayerDetail.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. back in training, see club press release…
PlayerDetail.reasonRequired: Please briefly describe what is wrong.
PlayerDetail.thanks: Thanks! Your suggestion was saved. We'll review it.

TV.title: TV & Streams
TV.subtitle: Official broadcasters and streaming services
TV.vpnSubtitle: For legal geo-access – affiliate links with commission
TV.affiliateDisclosure: Advertising disclosure: Some links are affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
TV.geoHint: Detected via server headers / IP (not stored). Availability depends on rights.
TV.legalOnly: Official free-to-air and media libraries only – no illegal streams.
TV.vpnFreeHint: Public free services with geo-blocks. VPN may unlock access – respect provider terms and local law.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.apiHint: Optional – for live data from TheSportsDB and football-data.org. Stored locally and optionally in Supabase.

Match.lineupHint: Status, goals, cards, subs – click opens all matches for the player
Match.noTv: No TV data set. See TV & Streams.
Match.noPlayers: No Croatian players listed for this match.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.unsupported: Browser does not support push notifications
Notifications.prompt: Get notified about live goals and kick-offs

Footer.disclaimer: No illegal streams. Official sources only.
Footer.sources: Data: ESPN, TheSportsDB and more · TV: official providers only
Footer.brandTagline: Croatian pros in Europe – live, news & legal TV

Errors.notFoundBody: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.
